subject: Save the USPS ✉️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
The United States Postal Service is under _serious_ financial strain. It will require federal assistance to stay fully operational. President Trump, however, has threatened to deny the USPS the funding it needs, describing our national postal service as "a joke."
The livelihood of the USPS should **not** be on the chopping block -- _especially_ when so many Americans are relying on home deliveries due to COVID-19
**That 's why Linda is demanding Congress take action to save the USPS from the Trump Administration. [Will you stand behind the USPS by co-signing Linda's petition?](https://act.myngp.com/el/jR69Lb0dLhJrRK10P_xIN5FQk_wE5BoMmnMj_rTYCmo=/VqkbfFuVoIMm8MS59ZEOTsHrWFSDp08Ya1m54XbKiRU=?code=Sanchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_0720_USPAJA)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jR69Lb0dLhJrRK10P_xIN5FQk_wE5BoMmnMj_rTYCmo=/880TtJ29ek81hNQnpH5lwyUEayw5MYhCycQZZiRXzQw=?code=Sanchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_0720_USPAJA)

Peter --

There is so much at stake for our country in November. From how we handle the coronavirus and rebuild the economy in its wake, to how we combat climate change. From stopping gun violence to making progress towards racial justice.

What happens on November 3rd couldn't be more critical.

And no matter what issue gets you fired up -- health care, immigration, women's rights, education, LGBTQ+ rights, and more -- it's all on the ballot and a part of this fight for the soul of the nation.

Peter, if we're going to start working towards equal opportunity, equal rights, and equal justice, we need to defeat Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden. And to win in November, we have to invest in organizing and advertising programs across the country _today_.

---|---|---
Friend,

Building One Indiana means working on a lot of things in our state (improving education, skilling up our workforce, lowering the infant mortality rate, and much, MUCH, more).

_But sometimes, it just means literally building. _

Before COVID-19, we were making record investments in our roads and bridges. That record road construction continued -- at an accelerated speed!

And now we’re committed to continuing to help Hoosier families and businesses by taking our infrastructure to the next level.

**Including finishing I-69.**
[**Add your name and help us finish I-69 —>**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=954ae6037cec4400a80e69c850c4ad47&_e=1oUBtQV5TrdWswCVKYwyGOfiTutmIFNZRUBcRhHafZvxgL_p0N7HcxHORLfe0j2AdXLzsNosju4s5OCi_qoGC2XjDpCzmND86Xy-zYUxQHA15kwAFgtOmYGpGUjkWttHLycVuUJkFttNKKhUbukVD2vIHwPtfd8y-eWZnmbkfvzIp7pgKhdB0YNgKzZo0bZR2sJ4GKVjkGy9A0dNwSO70VuuJUt0MYKwejZIY8cVbSwsGb1pRwefuxCYwo6xDFVjuVLzCLGD8gyEO-_1rb1D_Vsq9WbKawp32JH_zvWNaGDLiBdsHbUs4EfusDFcN32xfdcqUbxCYBfVN4Fd1OMO9BZcagwqAa5y1I8YYT1lSEw1qPenmE1j_aIQpSsbmkhLHYbCT3oIaUb63fjBdiBf65RA3YOD2VuKIuPRz9T9Uo0AGcTuYQwBDf_SfBhpESLe3PABvm_bz4ZtucxJpw-8sEo57362J0bv5yfT834Udn0%3D)
Finishing I-69 will provide a powerful economic engine for all of Indiana and make sure that Hoosier families can travel across our state safely. It’s a symbol of our commitment to building a 21st-century economy, and an infrastructure system that truly works for all Hoosiers.

We’re on the road (pun intended!) to building One Indiana, and following through on infrastructure projects like finishing I-69 is a crucial part step towards our future.

Friend, we need to know that you stand with us on this journey. Will you add your name and help us in our push to finish I-69? We’re almost there.
[**Add your name and help us finish I-69 —>**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=954ae6037cec4400a80e69c850c4ad47&_e=1oUBtQV5TrdWswCVKYwyGOfiTutmIFNZRUBcRhHafZvxgL_p0N7HcxHORLfe0j2AdXLzsNosju4s5OCi_qoGC2XjDpCzmND86Xy-zYUxQHA15kwAFgtOmYGpGUjkWttHLycVuUJkFttNKKhUbukVD2vIHwPtfd8y-eWZnmbkfvzIp7pgKhdB0YNgKzZo0bZR2sJ4GKVjkGy9A0dNwSO70VuuJUt0MYKwejZIY8cVbSwsGb1pRwefuxCYwo6xDFVjuVLzCLGD8gyEO-_1rb1D_VdGu63lDrkWluVpWEY5EsOeTHjmxQ_5Mbx9D2fJfGD9FvgZarGHRjfDsSjYJ1sESFLjKacBhMlptw8H85UOIGRyMqFR1cN1e_mNyDz1sxrqsytM9scJglN6pAJCVFMxNE2Y361UaK2PiJYbQn6G2R6Cv9HtaAAnNxrOphG9exd63BqLimW0Ib9HQV8gL5-VpnQXwuYf7FbGPAIzpgHY9qU%3D)
Thank you for everything you do. We’ll be in touch soon.

Best,

Your Holcomb Crew

name: My Faith Votes
subject: This Week’s Action Items
body:
| | Peter, Here are our top four highlights of the week to keep you informed and help you take action as we are just 115 days away from the November 3 election. So many of you are asking “what can I do to help Christians vote?” We’ve created seven simple ways for you to start taking action right now. Roll up your sleeves and choose one or more ways to equip and motivate other Christians to vote! We recently sat down for two important conversations with Pastor Vance Pitman and My Faith Votes National Spokesperson, Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.). At a time when it’s easy to feel discouraged by the divisive political climate, these conversations will encourage you and challenge you to stand boldly for biblical values in this critical election season. The Supreme Court has issued a number of decisions, both last week and this week, that will have a tremendous impact on our nation. We break down three of those decisions to help Christians understand the impact of each ruling. | [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZYFyzVJbxjf5JLUKiAbvHp&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200711com01&n=1) | [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iVNdamD3vYZ35jFFLSfXxq_pKUgTPEtC2a8WkNK4lyT0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200711com01&n=2)

name: Jessica Morse
subject: The Dictator's Guide to Autocracy
body:
| | | |
---
Friends,
President Trump commuting the sentence of Roger Stone yesterday felt like the last brick in a long road toward autocracy. Russia, Turkey, Hungry and India all offer modern examples of democracies that spiraled into autocratic rule. Under President Trump, America is charging down this same path.
Our democracy may not survive four more months of a Trump presidency, let alone four more years. While it seems clear that Trump’s popularity is in steep decline, memories of 2016 polls predicting a sweeping Clinton victory, still haunt me. We can’t take anything for granted.
[It’s up to us to secure a win in November. Can you pitch in for Joe Biden today? ](https://u16460731.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=rf6U8ijtGmaHDE08oAvVWtTCqzhYs0y8RAST-2FH6M6jiSzgKl-2BlaUz-2FHeuMQhdbCyM85WoPKdON2gbJQN1I6ldgGLx-2BUdCrkfP3ayqm-2Fel2CIyy8GFOyIxi0WWmvIr7si45Zn_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6mdkoH1-2FSLt3aUm0caYCjWY3D-2FuQlWSWKuq-2Fy0551g3SuXEi-2Bn9DkVIEvAs0f0HQNM65la5nHbFPbi9DRNsn6leVn8PKT90oNrLkohEEzrr-2FnE-2BZi-2BhA0axXrxL7HWPcZh126EwLANDSnDAArzDxBTnLYJuWMHvFod2spvQWfA-2F8vgjF1zQ92cZX9Pi-2Bph49Ev4A97Ed73O5pBVeX2B4qO3ReCj44l0-2FM1LvNnk9a5KNCuD7iNoJQvNqpp3uUhs0YRa-2FR-2BznlPL89Ytw8tDJb-2BARwdNPagNT-2FDE16EMke5W1A8uKdg9L7ILqwAzvITvRyAa0FfwQbNyadmxyGEYWmzwx0yyVTTP0lO4QsGu5jLiALTfICJf0elw4KB7YFI4ZIgTd-2BuVb6ReFI4L-2BdyuVhhqFHbObLpKTAncL-2BZsW8R-2FEs88elLD5xBBz6I-2FJNTeDquzKF0evODGIS3SiJG4t5hdrpYyZYhEXl-2FXvpQ02znsEXsamVwpa7xe-2FQNvqv4ygqFA4fLwAGjz6Jpm5QbIFvg32MWt0JoMDi-2Fm3jrgKTQVYaV7hHPuzMFA6UbAOxHiW-2BrhCPeB-2BjaaMFFFd4CLdZaOfbt8l9QB-2FNjcAvNCa1JZw-2FFBdhVlIDFkv7LkVrMY982o7dkSue9QJ077Di6rXC73-2BaKTqSLYb70jWOCkUiyFevvwe0EVK3qK0YvlzLinggqByDw2iA3w-2FK7sfb40QcGS257iGHtBilc70kK3l9dNj73ips8BfTh7725YA9-2FCh5fzJxbFvgrRNoAV17Ckqveg-3D-3D)
It may sound alarmist to talk about autocratic trends, but the US is currently taking the same steps that eroded other established democracies into autocratic dictatorship with clear examples even in the last few weeks:
Step 1 - Cronyism: Autocrats erode democracy by surrounding themselves with a group of powerful influencers who benefit from the leader retaining power. Mitch McConnell daily apologizes for Trump to push his own agenda. Bill Barr assumed control of police forces and ordered the violent clearance of Lafayette Square for a Presidential photo op. Lindsey Graham and other conservative leaders enable President Trump by defending his actions like justifying yesterday's blatant disregard for rule of law saying, ‘Roger Stone is a first time offender.’
Step 2 - Manipulate elections: In the US gerrymandering, voter suppression, and campaign finance structurally promote minority rule. But even more concerning is the blatant willingness to jeopardize free and fair elections. Roger Stone ushered in Russian interference in our election without consequence. Trump’s efforts to prevent vote-by-mail ballots including not funding the Post Office creates dramatic barriers for voters in a pandemic evidenced by Georgia's primary.
Step 3 - Stack the courts: Trump has already appointed 200 Judges, more than nearly any modern President. While we are relieved that the conservative Supreme Court has demonstrated some independence in the past weeks, the consequence of Trump’s appointments throughout the judicial system will reverberate for generations.
Step 4 - Media as a megaphone: Fox News, with over 3.6 million loyal viewers, is a mouthpiece for Trump’s message rather than accountability. At the same time we’re seeing local news outlets disappear and international stalwarts of independent journalism like the Voice of America fall into crisis. By inserting a Trump loyalist to run The Voice of America, an organization that served as the stalwart for truth for citizens in countries like Russia and China, could become a propaganda network itself.
Step 5 - Intimidate opponents: While there has never been a shortage of examples of the President bullying opponents on Twitter, more concerning is the firing of inspector generals from the State Department, Defense Department, Intelligence Community, Health and Human Services, and Department of Transportation this spring. Lt Col Alexander Vindman was bullied into retirement after he testified at President Trump’s impeachment trial. This is an assault on government accountability and leaves an open door for corruption within our institutions.
Step 6 - Discredit civil society: A classic autocratic play is to paint NGO’s and activist groups as the enemy. Whether demonizing Planned Parenthood or claiming Black Lives Matter is a vehicle for anarchists, President Trump is trying to undermine civil society organizations because they threaten his authority, not because they threaten America. Organizing protests, marches, offering legislative agendas, and giving a voice to citizens hungry to be heard are the fundamental tools of a democracy. As police shoot rubber bullets and tear gas into groups of peaceful protestors, the very fundamentals of democracy are under assault. It falls to us to hold the line.
America is frighteningly far down this path toward autocracy. The question is, can we bring our democracy back? The answer: we have to.
[It’s time to support Joe Biden. If you’ve already supported, donate again. ](https://u16460731.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=rf6U8ijtGmaHDE08oAvVWtTCqzhYs0y8RAST-2FH6M6jiSzgKl-2BlaUz-2FHeuMQhdbCyM85WoPKdON2gbJQN1I6ldgGLx-2BUdCrkfP3ayqm-2Fel2CIyy8GFOyIxi0WWmvIr7siT9yT_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6mdkoH1-2FSLt3aUm0caYCjWY3D-2FuQlWSWKuq-2Fy0551g3SuXEi-2Bn9DkVIEvAs0f0HQNM65la5nHbFPbi9DRNsn6leVn8PKT90oNrLkohEEzrr-2FnE-2BZi-2BhA0axXrxL7HWPcZh126EwLANDSnDAArzDxBTnLYJuWMHvFod2spvQWfA-2F8vgjF1zQ92cZX9Pi-2Bph49Ev4A97Ed73O5pBVeX2B4qO3ReCj44l0-2FM1LvNnk9a5KNCuD7iNoJQvNqpp3uUhs0YRa-2FR-2BznlPL89Ytw8tDJb-2BARwdNPagNT-2FDE16EMke5W1A8uKdg9L7ILqwAzvITvRyAa0FfwQbNyadmxyGEYWmzwx0yyVTTP0lO4QsGu5jLiALTfICJf0elw4KB7YFI4ZIgTd-2BuVb6ReFI4L-2BdyuVhhqFHbObLpKTAncL-2BZsW8R-2FEs88elLD5xBBz6I-2FJNTeDquzKF0evODGIS3SiJG4t5hdrpYyZYhEXl-2FXvpQ02znsEXsamVwpa7xe-2FQNvqv4ygqFA4fLwAGjz6Jpm5QbIFvg32MWt0JoMDi-2Fm3jrgKTQVYaV7hHPuzMFA6UbAOxHiW-2BrhCPeB-2BjaaMFFFd4CLdZaEhmGdrMLBpt4kx4qMMGkM-2Fv3rUl-2B3-2ByJ-2FlJN4K5YJddotwq7eYnMTve3VcxhNLcSp7QZQ-2BAFaqWwicvk7teZV7lFCNEt0XnimHFQFw9UaxkfiOlpkKZrrYLPTwjePnNliEAjhwxEaIJcNuIoTD-2FavYepJ5qjMdRtkeSzl4chnmIF-2F-2Fon0qVuRiOmqh9JYknQw-3D-3D)
I know you are doing everything in your power to organize and defend our democracy. Thank you for all of your efforts. Our democracy depends on you.
With resolve,

clean_body: | | | | Friends, President Trump commuting the sentence of Roger Stone yesterday felt like the last brick in a long road toward autocracy. Russia, Turkey, Hungry and India all offer modern examples of democracies that spiraled into autocratic rule. Under President Trump, America is charging down this same path. Our democracy may not survive four more months of a Trump presidency, let alone four more years. While it seems clear that Trump’s popularity is in steep decline, memories of 2016 polls predicting a sweeping Clinton victory, still haunt me. We can’t take anything for granted. It may sound alarmist to talk about autocratic trends, but the US is currently taking the same steps that eroded other established democracies into autocratic dictatorship with clear examples even in the last few weeks: Step 1 - Cronyism: Autocrats erode democracy by surrounding themselves with a group of powerful influencers who benefit from the leader retaining power. Mitch McConnell daily apologizes for Trump to push his own agenda. Bill Barr assumed control of police forces and ordered the violent clearance of Lafayette Square for a Presidential photo op. Lindsey Graham and other conservative leaders enable President Trump by defending his actions like justifying yesterday's blatant disregard for rule of law saying, ‘Roger Stone is a first time offender.’ Step 2 - Manipulate elections: In the US gerrymandering, voter suppression, and campaign finance structurally promote minority rule. But even more concerning is the blatant willingness to jeopardize free and fair elections. Roger Stone ushered in Russian interference in our election without consequence. Trump’s efforts to prevent vote-by-mail ballots including not funding the Post Office creates dramatic barriers for voters in a pandemic evidenced by Georgia's primary. Step 3 - Stack the courts: Trump has already appointed 200 Judges, more than nearly any modern President. While we are relieved that the conservative Supreme Court has demonstrated some independence in the past weeks, the consequence of Trump’s appointments throughout the judicial system will reverberate for generations. Step 4 - Media as a megaphone: Fox News, with over 3.6 million loyal viewers, is a mouthpiece for Trump’s message rather than accountability. At the same time we’re seeing local news outlets disappear and international stalwarts of independent journalism like the Voice of America fall into crisis. By inserting a Trump loyalist to run The Voice of America, an organization that served as the stalwart for truth for citizens in countries like Russia and China, could become a propaganda network itself. Step 5 - Intimidate opponents: While there has never been a shortage of examples of the President bullying opponents on Twitter, more concerning is the firing of inspector generals from the State Department, Defense Department, Intelligence Community, Health and Human Services, and Department of Transportation this spring. Lt Col Alexander Vindman was bullied into retirement after he testified at President Trump’s impeachment trial. This is an assault on government accountability and leaves an open door for corruption within our institutions. Step 6 - Discredit civil society: A classic autocratic play is to paint NGO’s and activist groups as the enemy. Whether demonizing Planned Parenthood or claiming Black Lives Matter is a vehicle for anarchists, President Trump is trying to undermine civil society organizations because they threaten his authority, not because they threaten America. Organizing protests, marches, offering legislative agendas, and giving a voice to citizens hungry to be heard are the fundamental tools of a democracy. As police shoot rubber bullets and tear gas into groups of peaceful protestors, the very fundamentals of democracy are under assault. It falls to us to hold the line. America is frighteningly far down this path toward autocracy. The question is, can we bring our democracy back? The answer: we have to. I know you are doing everything in your power to organize and defend our democracy. Thank you for all of your efforts. Our democracy depends on you. With resolve, Jessica P.S. name: Howard Dean
subject: Democrats can win in all 50 states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Reverend Warnock is the leader we need to meet this moment
| | |
---
Friend - we can win in all 50 states if we fight in all 50 states. And let me tell you, the Senate race for unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler's seat in Georgia is 100% a winnable fight. With Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) at the helm, we will turn that seat blue - and actually earn it, unlike its current occupant. Here's how I know:
When I served as chair of the DNC during the 2006 elections, we won the House _and_ flipped the Senate blue. We did it by building the strongest grassroots team possible and fighting tooth and nail for every seat, in every state. And this year, we can do the same if we do what it takes to support game-changing candidates nationwide - starting with Reverend Raphael Warnock in his Georgia race.
It's never been more important that we send leaders to Washington who will champion the needs of the people, not the profiteers. The stakes are too high for anything less. **But Reverend Warnock is facing a critical fundraising deadline, and he's counting on us to help him raise $20,000 by midnight tonight.** [**So I'm asking personally: Will you give $5 right now to power his campaign and help Democrats win everywhere this November?**](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e511/288179be/876dc29/348e6ac0/3037050066/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzAwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk300-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Reverend Warnock is the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. If elected, he'd be the first Black senator Georgia has _ever_ elected. Reverend Warnock is running to restore moral leadership to Washington and stand up for Georgia families who have been left behind by Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump.
All of that makes him the exact right person to meet this moment in history. I haven't lived through a time like this since 1968 - it feels as though an earthquake has shaken this country, and it's so obvious that we need to elect leaders who will continue our push for civil rights and champion the fights started at the very pulpit where Reverend Warnock now preaches.
**I meant what I said: We can win in all 50 states if we _fight_ in all 50 states. There are two Senate races in Georgia this year, and they're both 100% winnable. I know we can elect Reverend Warnock and flip Georgia blue. But we can't make any mistakes. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says we need to win Georgia to take back the Senate. This is the first battleground that unlocks the whole map.**
**Right now, ahead of their critical deadline, Reverend Warnock's team tells me they're still falling short of their goal. Time is running out, and we only win together, so please: [Will you give $5 or more now clean_body: Reverend Warnock is the leader we need to meet this moment | | | Friend - we can win in all 50 states if we fight in all 50 states. And let me tell you, the Senate race for unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler's seat in Georgia is 100% a winnable fight. With Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) at the helm, we will turn that seat blue - and actually earn it, unlike its current occupant. Here's how I know: When I served as chair of the DNC during the 2006 elections, we won the House and flipped the Senate blue. We did it by building the strongest grassroots team possible and fighting tooth and nail for every seat, in every state. And this year, we can do the same if we do what it takes to support game-changing candidates nationwide - starting with Reverend Raphael Warnock in his Georgia race. It's never been more important that we send leaders to Washington who will champion the needs of the people, not the profiteers. The stakes are too high for anything less. But Reverend Warnock is facing a critical fundraising deadline, and he's counting on us to help him raise $20,000 by midnight tonight. "" Reverend Warnock is the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. If elected, he'd be the first Black senator Georgia has ever elected. Reverend Warnock is running to restore moral leadership to Washington and stand up for Georgia families who have been left behind by Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump. All of that makes him the exact right person to meet this moment in history. I haven't lived through a time like this since 1968 - it feels as though an earthquake has shaken this country, and it's so obvious that we need to elect leaders who will continue our push for civil rights and champion the fights started at the very pulpit where Reverend Warnock now preaches. I meant what I said: We can win in all 50 states if we fight in all 50 states. There are two Senate races in Georgia this year, and they're both 100% winnable. I know we can elect Reverend Warnock and flip Georgia blue. But we can't make any mistakes. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says we need to win Georgia to take back the Senate. This is the first battleground that unlocks the whole map. Right now, ahead of their critical deadline, Reverend Warnock's team tells me they're still falling short of their goal. Time is running out, and we only win together, so please: "" "" "" "" "" Thanks for believing that what's right is also what's possible. Let's go. Howard Dean Former VT governor Former chair, DNC | | "" | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. "" | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Saturday Recap: Housing, Travel, and Apps
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the highlights from last week.
Starting next week, I'll be moving to one press conference a week on Wednesdays at 1 p.m. I'll still be sending out these emails every day, though, so that you can get the most recent info when you need it. If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xl7WL2l5a7hTq8-f3Ovia3EG90MRli3KO7zUP0AOaOor_YRe62kv0v33TNNr-e7nrifUuUKeM3kLnOMXA4GdQ4NcWMbxsLfR_kqW8ybLNUgr4csu-FJgtPD4ugAP4lCikYugwIEYl6TzhObEcZdHUp0Stqx_gfIbBCNqKkUV3FuTWjgQzjHQuFXu_mMG1M8vbZPM-cFOFt4JAcvie36pxwd69eyeQU6Url18v09IeXR17BjiFgrKF7fFmYdG_zJN0VvGaNuW559M-s5_bP_bzSxB2ClDcbo9k2R00O7egyO0VwGh4enUu5OzB3Nh4END1urMpfTqKKk=&c=nlRkml47J7FvDiBPBSid_0XL9xwnBCNxb79aruH20D_sQxiCehozaA==&ch=F_WdsdUTslBGkCSCEr25CG6glGdSabLyI0wYthkVmla5PCA30zCbVw==). The better we stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
HOUSING RELIEF

We are launching an eviction diversion effort called the Safe Harbor Housing Program. This program will serve as an alternative to the traditional eviction process and provide landlords and tenants an opportunity to work towards a solution outside of the court system. We're going to be putting $7 million of CARES Act funding into this effort, which we expect will support between 1,000 and 2,000 Rhode Islanders to maintain stable housing.

Renters who meet income criteria and are behind on their rent because of the COVID-19 emergency will be able to qualify for assistance. Tenants can apply directly, or landlords can apply on behalf of tenants who need help getting back on their feet. Starting Monday, you can contact United Way and ask about the Safe Harbor program to start the application process.If both parties agree to participate, they'll be contacted by a United Way housing specialist to finalize a payment agreement supported by CARES Act funding. Tenants who need legal advice will be able to access free legal services.

I want to thank the District Court and the United Way for their collaboration in this process. Starting Monday, you can go to the United Way website or call 211 to apply.
| | |
---|---
|
TRAVEL REGULATIONS

If you are coming to Rhode Island from outside the United States, you need to quarantine for two weeks after arriving in Rhode Island. That means no social visits, no trips to the beach, no outdoor dining at one of our fantastic restaurants. You can do all of that once your 14 days of quarantine are done.

If you are traveling from [one of the 28 states with a 5% or greater test positive rate](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xl7WL2l5a7hTq8-f3Ovia3EG90MRli3KO7zUP0AOaOor_YRe62kv0l6du5UeCdz1VEOYjx7nyawV2o3M8Q27dyVUoYj10RQ0_kB1guBtHhcTA6jfHtDuUSolDcWuzr4iI2eIF1tUXniv6aKVIaa-dQ==&c=nlRkml47J7FvDiBPBSid_0XL9xwnBCNxb79aruH20D_sQxiCehozaA==&ch=F_WdsdUTslBGkCSCEr25CG6glGdSabLyI0wYthkVmla5PCA30zCbVw==) you need to quarantine for 14 days. The only exception is providing a negative COVID-19 test. You can do that in two ways: you can get tested in your home state in the 72 hours before you travel to Rhode Island or you can get tested once you're here. If you get tested in Rhode Island, you will still need to quarantine until you receive a negative result. People from out of state can schedule a test in Rhode Island using [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xl7WL2l5a7hTq8-f3Ovia3EG90MRli3KO7zUP0AOaOor_YRe62kv0v33TNNr-e7n7ZmKR6VoycP5sGeau8xKaXgmF6gxr60vJxsSfeR7RQfL6CQTqWmWFda3goCjeewdUO2rW6BCUPf0oNtsjw11KV3Ct5-YrwNS2XPykSfx4wC1BjwAqgzo55OpNFkXS64n7engZPHeL187ucotyCMTq6ME4fczm7RDxLqRjwn4UVvJXICk_VPqFY24Y9yUz1tp8FdyGG83CYLVwgr1oa8Uw4q1TGCbTOJ-JCiuU7bFcA-4nmI1rN2Q-gX7H4RTwUNa&c=nlRkml47J7FvDiBPBSid_0XL9xwnBCNxb79aruH20D_sQxiCehozaA==&ch=F_WdsdUTslBGkCSCEr25CG6glGdSabLyI0wYthkVmla5PCA30zCbVw==).
| | |
---|---
|
CRUSH COVID

Yesterday we announced that Version 2 of the CRUSH COVID RI app is now available for download in the Apple App store and Google Play. The new version includes upgrades to the location and symptom diaries, a map of testing sites, and more resources and FAQs for Rhode Islanders.

What didn't change is our strong commitment to privacy. This app does not collect any personally identifiable information, and your data is stored on your phone only and automatically deletes after 20 days. It is only available to you, unless you get coronavirus and give specific consent to share your data with the Rhode Island Department of Health. If you choose to share it, your data will be stored anonymously and the only person who will link it to you is your case investigator at the Department of Health.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates this week Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xl7WL2l5a7hTq8-f3Ovia3EG90MRli3KO7zUP0AOaOor_YRe62kv0v33TNNr-e7n9qDlueev7xnSNurB_mrlZWNXnlpA-Q4MIHzk5m2ovagDRYf4l36ubFKkhTBMKSA-J0hYN2FjIerkDsJPhbTfgbC3G3n9G-xrvpGQtlz_zWWosX2as_IJ-rP55VLDtGOcdqWdIaWkgcsg0i9YgpJVLHQIeAINWeNaJ58HMjAsm-uBXWFXrUYiLIV_IaRWGNei5HUFcEWD6yXKJArO-2JQrN4-hNjEnYNGwiU73oJDzoL7BhvmTwvRhBjsND11OKJVqk1r1BLJWqjItIxYMsd8LiJoxsPuuTJ9wk0AOZN6-hEk6WzP9Wec8VZaum64xtYJUGJ-3hoC2KR6_TlgKqPItRFfPXoNM4tc4gFMtIlaBomomirWPxtoAVb9AE9oTBgm&c=nlRkml47J7FvDiBPBSid_0XL9xwnBCNxb79aruH20D_sQxiCehozaA==&ch=F_WdsdUTslBGkCSCEr25CG6glGdSabLyI0wYthkVmla5PCA30zCbVw==).

The better we stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19. | | | ---|--- | HOUSING RELIEF We are launching an eviction diversion effort called the Safe Harbor Housing Program. This program will serve as an alternative to the traditional eviction process and provide landlords and tenants an opportunity to work towards a solution outside of the court system. We're going to be putting $7 million of CARES Act funding into this effort, which we expect will support between 1,000 and 2,000 Rhode Islanders to maintain stable housing. Renters who meet income criteria and are behind on their rent because of the COVID-19 emergency will be able to qualify for assistance. Tenants can apply directly, or landlords can apply on behalf of tenants who need help getting back on their feet. Starting Monday, you can contact United Way and ask about the Safe Harbor program to start the application process.If both parties agree to participate, they'll be contacted by a United Way housing specialist to finalize a payment agreement supported by CARES Act funding. Tenants who need legal advice will be able to access free legal services. I want to thank the District Court and the United Way for their collaboration in this process. Starting Monday, you can go to the United Way website or call 211 to apply. | | | ---|--- | TRAVEL REGULATIONS If you are coming to Rhode Island from outside the United States, you need to quarantine for two weeks after arriving in Rhode Island. That means no social visits, no trips to the beach, no outdoor dining at one of our fantastic restaurants. You can do all of that once your 14 days of quarantine are done. If you are traveling from == you need to quarantine for 14 days. The only exception is providing a negative COVID-19 test. You can do that in two ways: you can get tested in your home state in the 72 hours before you travel to Rhode Island or you can get tested once you're here. If you get tested in Rhode Island, you will still need to quarantine until you receive a negative result. People from out of state can schedule a test in Rhode Island using ==. | | | ---|--- | CRUSH COVID Yesterday we announced that Version 2 of the CRUSH COVID RI app is now available for download in the Apple App store and Google Play. The new version includes upgrades to the location and symptom diaries, a map of testing sites, and more resources and FAQs for Rhode Islanders. What didn't change is our strong commitment to privacy. This app does not collect any personally identifiable information, and your data is stored on your phone only and automatically deletes after 20 days. It is only available to you, unless you get coronavirus and give specific consent to share your data with the Rhode Island Department of Health. If you choose to share it, your data will be stored anonymously and the only person who will link it to you is your case investigator at the Department of Health. | I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates this week Wednesday at 1 p.m. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

body:
I'm ready to take on Sen. Cornyn and win this November.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890129/7f51f7bc/41c35cc3/4ef67bae/958142224/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

It's hard to believe the runoff is just 3 days away! We've come a long way on this campaign, traveling tens of thousands of miles (in person at first, and then digitally) and speaking with thousands of Texans about the issues that matter to their families.

As a combat veteran and working mom, I know firsthand how Sen. Cornyn is failing Texans. From voting 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act (and doing nothing while his allies try to strike it down in court during the middle of a pandemic) to refusing to take meaningful action on gun violence, Sen. Cornyn has always put special interests ahead of working families.

**I 'm ready to take him on and win this November, but [I need your help to win the runoff first. ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890129/7f51f7bc/41c35cc3/4ef67bad/958142224/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2OTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200711.3nd__1697__&amount=10")**

Brandon and I have already cast our votes, and we know quite a few Texans already have too. But there are still undecided voters out there, and we need your help to reach them before they hit the polls. We're working around the clock to reach every last voter we can and make our case for why this campaign is best positioned to defeat Sen. Cornyn in November.

Wearing a mask shows that you care about your safety and the safety of others. You care about essential workers risking harm every day to help you get what you need.

We all have to do our part to slow the spread of COVID-19 -- and wearing a mask is one of the most patriotic things you can do right now.

But we know Donald Trump doesn't see it that way. So it's up to us to spread the word: **Caring for others is inherently American. Wear a mask.**

[If you agree, Peter, we want to send you this exclusive "Wear a Mask" sticker. Just chip in whatever you can for shipping before midnight >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_wearamasksticker?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.11_B3_masksticker_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.11_B3_masksticker_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2")

Team Joe

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

[DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf71/1cd0ac28/8a581a03/357c2bd5/4009959401/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer-wsupporterbox&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf71/1cd0ac28/8a581a03/357c2bd1/4009959401/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf71/1cd0ac28/8a581a03/357c2bc9/4009959401/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
